## Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the Jira issue.
- [ ] Out-of-scope work was not introduced.
- [ ] Tests and completion commands pass.
- [ ] Documentation and relative links were reviewed.
- [ ] No secrets or generated local files are included.
- [ ] Copilot review is complete.
- [ ] Final human validation is complete.
